quote: Do nothing that is of no use.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

quote: There is nothing outside of yourself that can ever enable you to get better, stronger, richer, quicker, or smarter. Everything is within. Everything exists. Seek nothing outside of yourself.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

quote: Today is victory over yourself of yesterday; tomorrow is your victory over lesser men.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

quote: Think lightly of yourself and deeply of the world.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

quote: It may seem difficult at first, but everything is difficult at first.
author: Miyamoto Musashi

quote: The primary indication of a well-ordered mind is a man's ability to remain in one place and linger in his own company.
author: Seneca

quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.
author: Epictetus

quote: Associate with people who are likely to improve you.
author: Seneca

quote: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Self-control is strength. Right thought is mastery. Calmness is power.
author: James Allen

quote: The first and best victory is to conquer self.
author: Plato

quote: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: He who conquers himself is the mightiest warrior.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The water flows, but the river remains.
author: Zen Proverb

quote: When you aim for the moon, your mind is on the moon. Keep your mind on the path, and the target will find itself.
author: Zen Saying

quote: To know yourself is to study yourself in action with another person.
author: Bruce Lee
